name: Birds Nests
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the butter, shortening, brown sugar, flour, and salt.
2. Stir in the vanilla extract until well mixed.
3. Add the beaten egg whites to the mixture and mix gently until combined.
4. Roll the dough into 1-inch balls.
5. Roll each ball in crushed walnuts, pressing lightly.
6. Make a small indentation in the center of each ball.
7. Fill the indentations with jam.
8. Place the nests on an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes or until lightly browned.
